mapper.sql: id, name_enc, disorder_type, org_id, guardian_user_id, baseline_summary, annual_iep_summary, monthly_goal, reassess_date, iep_due_date, intervention_progress
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO child (name_enc, disorder_type, org_id, guardian_user_id, baseline_summary, annual_iep_summary, monthly_goal, reassess_date, iep_due_date, intervention_progress) VALUES (#{nameEnc}, #{disorderType}, #{orgId}, #{guardianUserId}, #{baselineSummary}, #{annualIepSummary}, #{monthlyGoal}, #{reassessDate}, #{iepDueDate}, #{interventionProgress})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM child ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM child WHERE org_id = #{orgId}
